title: Chapter 1
text: Contents 1- It’s a Gift One- True Simplicity Two- It Tolls for Thee Three- The Road Less Traveled Four- To Turn, Turn, Shall Be Our Delight… Five- Last Train to Glory 2- Lighting Out Six- Bid Me to Live Seven- Down the Ohio Eight- Some Rows Up Nine- “When Night Shadows the Plaza and the Front of the Great Edifice Becomes a Radiant Disc of Light” Ten- In the Heart of the City as Verity Sleeps Eleven- A Long Night’s Journey into Day 3- Cincinnati, the Queen City Twelve- America Is a Poem in Our Eyes Thirteen- What a Little Moonlight Can Do Fourteen- Dinner at Eight Fifteen- Watch Me Pull a Rabbit Out of the Hat Sixteen- A Little Entertainment Seventeen- Do Nothing Till You Hear Eighteen- On the Good Ship Lollipop Nineteen- Information Theory Twenty- Singin’ in the Rain 4- In the Silent Regions of the Gene Twenty-one- Getting to Know You Twenty-two- April in Paris Twenty-three- White Coral Bells Twenty-four- In the Night Kitchen Twenty-five- Bewitched, Bothered, and Bewildered Twenty-six- A Kat, a Brick, an Unseen Door Twenty-seven- My Funny Valentine Twenty-eight- Talk of the Town Twenty-nine- In a White Room Thirty- My Father Always Promised Us that We Would Live in France 5- “Miles Always Said Less Is More” Thirty-one- Since Love is Lord of Heaven and Earth Thirty-two- Die and Live Thirty-three- All the Music of Life Seems to Be Thirty-four- Night in the City Thirty-five- Vine Street Redux Thirty-six- Some Enchanted Evening Thirty-seven- Wake Up and Dream Thirty-eight- I Don’t Care if I Never Get Back Thirty-nine- After Many a Summer Dies the Queen Forty- Redemption and Release Forty-one- Bright Shining as the Sun
